mapper.sql: id, employee_id, contract_type, start_date, end_date, status, probation_months, renewal_count, notes, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee_contracts WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY start_date DESC
SELECT FROM employee_contracts WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee_contracts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY end_date
SELECT FROM employee_contracts WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY start_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE employee_contracts SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, contract_type = #{contractType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, probation_months = #{probationMonths}, renewal_count = #{renewalCount}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM employee_contracts WHERE id = #{id})
